body:
Friend,
Thanks for joining Seth Moulton for America.
Having you on the team from Day 1 is huge, and we are proud to have your support.
Here are three quick things you can do to help Seth out:
* Give Seth a 'like' on [**Facebook**](https://www.facebook.com/SethMoulton/), [**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/sethmoulton), and [**Instagram**](https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en)
* Help Seth get to the debate stage by jump-starting our push to get the 65,000 individual contributions required to join the first debate in June. [**Chip in here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sethmoulton2020e?refcode=autoresponder).
* Invite your friends to chip in. Even one dollar helps us get closer to 65,000 supporters, and we can't get there without your help.

Thanks again for joining the team. We're proud to have you on board.
Team Moulton

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I have a new plan to cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt for 42 million Americans and make universal free college a reality for all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Higher education opened a million doors for me, and I want every American to have the same opportunity. Read my plan now: | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc62/45c30650/b48ac1f7/66973bcb/1310890270/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Today, I'm calling for something truly transformational.

**I have a new plan to cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt for 42 million Americans and make universal free college a reality for all.**

It's fully paid for (and then some) by my Ultra-Millionaire Tax on the richest 0.1%.

**[We can make this big, structural change-- as long as we build a grassroots movement to fight for it. Add your name to say you support canceling student loan debt and making college free.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc62/45c30650/b48ac1f7/66973bcd/1310890270/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyMmVtMS12MXMxIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-college-plan?source=20190422em1-v1s1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

**According to independent experts, 95% of people who have student loan debt right now would get at least some of it canceled under my plan.

And more than 75% would get _all_ of it cancelled** -- poof, gone. We'd provide targeted cancellation for the families that need it most, substantially increasing Black and Latinx wealth, and helping decrease the racial wealth gap.

Once we've cleared out the debt that's holding down an entire generation of Americans, we'll ensure that we never have another student debt crisis again.

We can do that by recognizing that a public college education is like a public K-12 education -- a basic public good that should be available to everyone for free.

**My plan for universal free college would give every American the opportunity to attend a two-year or four-year public college without paying a dime in tuition or fees.**

And we'll make free college truly universal -- not just in theory, but in practice -- by making higher education of all kinds more inclusive and available to every single American, especially lower-income, Black, and Latinx students, without the need to take on debt to cover costs. Free tuition, and zero debt at graduation.

**This fight is personal for me.**

Growing up, my dream was to become a teacher. And I knew that if I wanted to teach, I had to get a college degree.

I managed to get a college scholarship, but then things turned upside down. The first boy I ever dated swooped back into my life and said he wanted to marry me. So I did what any sensible, mature 19-year-old would do: I said yes and dropped out of college.

I thought my dream of teaching was over. But then a friend told me about the University of Houston, a public four-year college about 40 minutes away. We were a young couple, watching every nickel. I figured I couldn't afford it.

But it turned out that tuition was just $50 a semester. This was a quality, public education -- and I could afford it on a part-time waitressing salary. This time, I had the good sense to grab my chance at college with both hands. I got my degree and I got to live my dream: I became a teacher for students with special needs.

**Higher education opened a million doors for me, and I want every American to have the same opportunity.**

It's how the daughter of a janitor in Oklahoma got to become a teacher, a law school professor, a U.S. senator, and eventually, a candidate for president of the United States.

**Together, we can get this done. We can relieve the student loan debt burden that 42 million Americans carry on their shoulders every day -- and we can address the root cause of this crisis by making universal free college a reality.**

**[Add your name if you're with me:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc62/45c30650/b48ac1f7/66973bcd/1310890270/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyMmVtMS12MXMxIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-college-plan?source=20190422em1-v1s1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/college-affordability](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc62/45c30650/b48ac1f7/66973bcf/1310890270/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyMmVtMS12MXMxIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/college-affordability?source=20190422em1-v1s1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc62/45c30650/b48ac1f7/66973bcd/1310890270/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyMmVtMS12MXMxIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-college-plan?source=20190422em1-v1s1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

subject: Top 10 Things the Media Got Wrong About ‘Collusion’ and ‘Obstruction’
body:
“The prestige press has some explaining to do — for subjecting the nation to a long, cruel ordeal named ‘collusion’ and ‘obstruction.’” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bf55b277b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Top 10 Things the Media Got Wrong About ‘Collusion’ and ‘Obstruction’**

“The prestige press has some explaining to do — for subjecting the nation to a long, cruel ordeal named ‘collusion’ and ‘obstruction,’” Sohrab Ahmari writes in the _New York Post_.

“All that remains of collusion and obstruction is the media’s shattered credibility. The errant reporters and pundits — the ones who peddled the most outrageous falsehoods — want nothing more than to move on. But not so fast: There has to be some accountability for the biggest foul-ups.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34af4206fc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Over a century of Easter tradition will continue at the White House on Monday morning, where thousands are gathering for the annual Easter Egg Roll,” Alejandro Alvarez reports for [WTOP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b1aced562&e=3ee4985eea). “The White House’s largest annual event is expected to bring more than 30,000 people to the South Lawn — including President Donald Trump, who is slated to join the celebration with First Lady Melania Trump later this morning alongside the Easter bunny.”
---
|
---
| “It’s time for Democrats and the country to move past the Russia collusion narrative and for the media to fess up. If we are not going to respect the outcome of the Mueller report, then what was the point of the whole exercise?” writes former Bill Clinton adviser Mark Penn in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5126fd40d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The country deserves a Congress focused not on investigations but on issues such as health care, infrastructure and immigration.”
---
|
---
| “As more families enter the country illegally, it costs the U.S. Border Patrol more to take care of them,” Anna Giaritelli reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c80abcf5e&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Agents apprehended 25,000 immigrants traveling as parts of families in southwestern Arizona over the past six months and expect to spend four times as much on food, baby products, and on-site medical care in 2019 as it did last year.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a9a69bca2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=574f375365&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1ffb585f90)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [Video] Lordstown
body:
This is very powerful. You really should watch.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)

Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
Last year, the CEO of General Motors made almost $22 million in compensation — nearly 300 times what the average worker at the company makes each year.
At the same time, GM is closing a number of profitable plants and shipping those jobs overseas, including one in Lordstown, Ohio.
I visited the Lordstown plant recently with a message for General Motors, and that is if corporations like GM think they can throw workers out on the street while they’re making billions in profits and then line up to receive even more money from federal government contracts, well... that ain’t going to happen when I am president.
**We made a short video from our visit. You need to see what is happening in Lordstown. The piece is quite powerful. Watch and share it with your friends on social media:**
**[FACEBOOK](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11043?t=2&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX) | [TWITTER](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11044?t=3&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX) | [YOUTUBE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11045?t=4&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)**
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11043?t=5&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)
Lordstown is an example of the horrific impact on a small town and a community when a company like General Motors gives billions of dollars in stock buybacks to make the very rich even richer while closing down plants and shipping those jobs overseas.
I have always felt there is something profoundly wrong with people and businesses that have so much money yet still decide that they are willing to step over working people, many with families and young children, in order to get more and more.
And what we have to decide is whether in our democracy, we are going to allow a handful of businesses on Wall Street to close down profitable plants like the one in Lordstown.
What we have to decide is whether or not we should allow a company like GM — which received a $50 billion bailout from the taxpayers of this country — to throw thousands of productive workers out on the street.
To say the least, that does not show a lot of love and gratitude.
So what we are going to do on this campaign, and when I am in the White House, is tell companies like General Motors that they are going to start being good corporate citizens — that their greed is going to end.
We are going to tell them that they will no longer continue to treat their workers with disdain and contempt.
**And that starts with spreading the word about what GM is doing in places like Lordstown.**
So please, watch our video from Lordstown and share it on your favorite social media channels like **[Facebook](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11043?t=6&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)** , **[Twitter](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11044?t=7&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)** , and **[YouTube](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11045?t=8&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)**.
This is important. People need to see what is happening in Lordstown.
Thank you for sharing their story.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
* * *

**Sign our petition: tell Donald Trump no more federal contracts for General Motors until they stop outsourcing American jobs, including the ones in Lordstown, Ohio.**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/trump_tough/?source=em190422-lordstown-15&t=9&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=11&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=12&refcode2=1117_150750_taOyyX&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=13&akid=1117%2E150750%2EtaOyyX).

Peter,

Last week a 2020 challenger announced that they are running against us, and we turned to you — our grassroots supporters — for the resources to respond and the chance to prove our strength.

Thanks to so many of you who chipped in during those first 72 hours, we sent a loud statement that Illinois families support our work and want even more of it. Thank you.

Today is Earth Day, and this year it carries more weight than ever before.

We have a president who denies the reality of climate change even as the U.N. and his own administration release detailed reports of the consequences that await us if we don’t act.

I have fought for years to find solutions to combat climate change, reduce emissions levels, and clean up the Great Lakes — but all the work I do relies on having public support behind me.

This Earth Day, will you voice your support for bold, science-based solutions to the challenges facing our planet? ADD YOUR VOICE [http://secure.ngpvan.com/6R7salro_0O4uW1R6KtGbQ2?emci=17d44911-3d65-e911-b49e-281878391efb&emdi=4e069b64-3d65-e911-b49e-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=rtEr9K2DmaXrMxDP0wnnQ73urUJ%2FgMYC9fDTgoTVCq6uJqr7TgW3rtdXU2DzMQuiP91FxqiLKuTU2O38fDRM6SmztEZlPuFfTH8MNs2U6HTiPCuMxL7t19Tfhj%2FaYMeL&refcode=source]

It’s so important that we remember what’s at stake in the fight against climate change.

Thank you for your support.

Dan

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happy Earth Day 2019, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Today, more than 190 countries around the world are celebrating Earth Day.
| | Dear Peter,

Today, more than 190 countries around the world are celebrating Earth Day, a global annual event to celebrate environmental protection and activism. While we've made tremendous strides in reclaiming parts of our planet from environmental ruin since Earth Day's founding in 1970, the threat of climate change is larger and more imminent than ever before.

Unfortunately, the idea of protecting our ecological landscape has become a wedge issue in our political one, despite the fact that climate change is an indiscriminate threat to all of humanity. It has no party loyalty or class preference; it will (and does) affect us all. Our economy, our national security, and our way of life are at stake if we continue allowing ourselves to debate the issue at the cost of addressing it in a meaningful way.

I love Earth Day and the activism it stirs in citizens around the world. More than a billion people today are reflecting on how their own actions are impacting the planet, and what each of us can do to avert the crisis at our door. But as I've said before, every day should be Earth Day. Every day, we should be acting with consideration for the generations after us who will have no choice but to deal with the consequences of our actions (or inaction).

As an elected Representative, the chair of a subcommittee focused on conservation, a mother, and a lover of nature, I carry that dedication to Capitol Hill with me every day. And I intend to continue doing so through 2020 and beyond.

[**Can you support this effort by contributing $20.19 to our 2020 reelection campaign in honor of Earth Day? This will help ensure that this pivotal seat remains occupied by a pro-environmental voice in Congress. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-sQKyfU8BZB9Gv7_N_uY5oZxFzUNV_OreajA_NS0wu4=/Qaa-_KhUb2EbOC49rVVP3wLS6c9m-9yaNtpostAZj8I=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.22_b1_as_all&amount=20.19) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/-sQKyfU8BZB9Gv7_N_uY5oZxFzUNV_OreajA_NS0wu4=/Qaa-_KhUb2EbOC49rVVP3wLS6c9m-9yaNtpostAZj8I=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.22_b1_as_all&amount=20.19)
---
Thank you for being a part of this, Peter, and for making a difference where it truly matters most. I look forward to helping build a path that leads all of us in Congress toward decisive, effective, and long-lasting environmental policy.

Sincerely,

_Abigail_

P.S. We just installed solar panels on our house, and we are so excited to do our little part in protecting our environment and encouraging renewable energy! (The monthly savings on our energy bill is pretty awesome, too.) Check out some of the photos we took!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-sQKyfU8BZB9Gv7_N_uY5oZxFzUNV_OreajA_NS0wu4=/Qaa-_KhUb2EbOC49rVVP3wLS6c9m-9yaNtpostAZj8I=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.22_b1_as_all&amount=25)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-sQKyfU8BZB9Gv7_N_uY5oZxFzUNV_OreajA_NS0wu4=/Qaa-_KhUb2EbOC49rVVP3wLS6c9m-9yaNtpostAZj8I=?refcode=em_fr_2019.04.22_b1_as_all&amount=25)
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/-sQKyfU8BZB9Gv7_N_uY5oZxFzUNV_OreajA_NS0wu4=/ZhPMtRd4-ERkDK7X_VkDCGpIZrnT5A8b4RAKQyQNJOo=)

| | Today of all days, concerned Americans have a unified message: if we wait to tackle climate chaos, it will be too late. **On Earth Day, we must renew the call. It's time for a Green New Deal for _all _Americans.** [**Sign my petition: join me and show your support for a Green New Deal.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ad02/6cd27893/4a0715f9/15800345/2046430949/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/green-new-deal/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-02-green-new-deal-email3") It's time to invest in clean and renewable energy. We _can_ create millions of clean energy jobs. We _must_ reinvent our nation's infrastructure to free us from dependence on polluting fossil fuels. We owe it to all of us to transform America's energy economy with a focus on social, economic, and racial justice. Our vision is ambitious but wholly necessary. It's said we're the first generation to feel the impacts of climate change, and the last to be able to do something about it. So let's do something about it. **[Join me on Earth Day: sign on to support a Green New Deal for America and our planet.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ad02/6cd27893/4a0715f9/15800345/2046430949/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/green-new-deal/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-02-green-new-deal-email3")** _Jeff_ [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ad02/6cd27893/4a0715f9/15800345/2046430949/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/green-new-deal/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-02-green-new-deal-email3") |

Special Counsel Robert Mueller's report paints a deeply disturbing picture of President Trump, his 2016 campaign, and his administration.

The report details multiple instances and a host of evidence that President Trump may have obstructed justice. Any claims by the President or his acolytes that this report exonerates him are untrue.

Congress must investigate the conduct outlined in Mueller's report. We need to hear from the Special Counsel himself.

[_**Sign my petition and demand Congress act immediately to have Robert Mueller testify and explain his report to the American people.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. We cannot rely on the words of Attorney General Barr about the seriousness of President Trump's actions. The Attorney General is clearly acting more as the personal lawyer of the president than the top lawyer for the American people.

The alarming allegations in Mueller's report demand an investigation to determine what actions, if any, should be taken.

We need public pressure to ensure Congress, especially Republicans, do their jobs.

[_**Sign my petition and demand Congress act immediately to have Robert Mueller testify about these serious allegations.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. Ed

| | |

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccbd/3eb3e2fc/4c786427/7449f767/2731225761/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")

| | As a single mother, I know every dollar is precious to your family. So I wouldn't ask unless I truly needed your help. [**_My son, Juli an only needs 10,000 more contributions to meet the DNC's criteria to participate in the Democratic debates. Could you chip in any amount before midnight to make sure he's on that stage? >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccbd/3eb3e2fc/4c786427/7449f766/2731225761/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosie-castro?refcode=20190422_em_fr_b1_rosie_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I know Julian isn't a frontrunner in this Presidential race. I know the media doesn't give him as much coverage as other candidates. But our family has never been frontrunners. We've never had anything handed to us. I taught Julian to work hard for everything he's ever earned. **And seeing his hard work pay off these last few weeks makes me so incredibly proud --_I can 't believe how close he's come to reaching that stage!_** So I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in before midnight so we can see my son share his story and vision on that Democratic debate stage? | | [**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccbd/3eb3e2fc/4c786427/7449f765/2731225761/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosie-castro?refcode=20190422_em_fr_b1_rosie_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=10")

I know there are so many ways you could spend your hard-earned money.

But I taught my son not to take a single cent for granted.

Which is why he's not accepting a single cent of corporate PAC money.

**Instead -- despite the media 's lack of coverage -- I see Julian rising above and working day and night to hear your concerns and earn your support -- _the right way. _**

subject: First Lady Melania Trump hosts the 141st White House Easter Egg Roll
body:
Today, First Lady Melania Trump and President Donald J. Trump celebrated a time-honored Easter tradition... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4772371e41&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 22, 2019
---
| | |
# **First Lady Melania Trump hosts the 141st White House Easter Egg Roll**

**Today,** First Lady Melania Trump and President Donald J. Trump celebrated a time-honored Easter tradition by hosting the 141st White House Easter Egg Roll.
**🎬****Watch:[First Lady reads to children at Easter Egg Roll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4729c9c053&e=3ee4985eea)**
**This year’s festivities** brought some new activities courtesy of Mrs. Trump, such as “musical eggs” and Be Best hopscotch—a nod to the First Lady’s signature Be Best initiative. Another new addition allowed children to spread some Easter joy by mailing postcards to friends, family, or military service members directly through a U.S. Postal Service mailbox located on the grounds.

**The White House Easter Egg Roll** officially dates back to 1878 and the presidency of Rutherford B. Hayes, but first-hand accounts suggest that informal festivities began as early as the Abraham Lincoln Administration. Egg roll attendance grew so popular that the number of guests had to be limited, and in 1939, the Secret Service had to go so far as shutting down a “racket” of children trying to sneak adults into the event for a fee.

**“I want to wish** everybody a very Happy Easter,” President Trump told families gathered on the South Lawn this morning. In all, more than 30,000 people were able to experience the rich tradition and fun of today’s historic event.

**[See President Trump and the First Lady welcome today’s guests.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d81961d926&e=3ee4985eea)**

**Watch:** **[Press Secretary Sarah Sanders reads to children](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9ec9895ed&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump: Bringing Iran’s oil exports to zero**

**Iran is the world’s** leading state sponsor of terror, bankrolling terrorist organizations such as al-Qaeda, Hezbollah, Hamas, and the Taliban. The regime has long used oil revenues to support destabilizing activities and fund terrorist proxies all over the world.

**President Trump** took further action today to bring those crucial oil exports to zero, denying the regime in Tehran its principal source of revenue. The Trump Administration has decided not to reissue Significant Reduction Exceptions—in effect, temporary sanction waivers—when they expire in early May, putting even more pressure on Iran.

**The United States** , Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates—three of the world’s great energy producers—are working together to ensure global oil markets remain well-supplied as Iranian oil is removed from the picture. Energy forecasters expect global oil supply will keep pace with demand in 2019.

**[President Trump is working to bring Iran’s oil exports to zero.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a23abfb30a&e=3ee4985eea)**

**The big picture:** **[Why the Iran nuclear deal was defective at its core](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94d8a19fd9&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## **A message from President Trump on Sri Lanka**

**Over Easter weekend,** a horrific terrorist attack took place in Sri Lanka, claiming the lives of hundreds of innocent people and leaving many more injured.

**“Spoke to Prime Minister** Ranil Wickremesinghe of Sri Lanka this morning to inform him that the United States stands by him and his country in the fight against terrorism,” [President Trump tweeted yesterday](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=468aaa7cdb&e=3ee4985eea). “Also expressed condolences on behalf of myself and the People of the United States!”

**[Statement from Press Secretary Sarah Sanders on Sri Lanka attacks.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba70ee68ea&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
